parameters.content:
## SOC -> 11 flat tables for RAG (no AI)
Reads the monthly + weekly + daily numbers from the 3 `<YEAR>_SOCN/E/W` aspect tabs in the SOURCE folder and writes 11 plain Google Sheets into the OUTPUT folder -- one per (aspect x grain): **New-Old Face / Show Up / Consecutive / Rotation**, each split into **Month / Week / Day** files (Consecutive has no Day grain -- matches the appscript). Each file has ONLY the columns that are ever populated at that grain, so no cell is ever structurally blank (the prior single-table-per-aspect design mixed grains and left some cells blank, which broke strict-typed RAG ingestion). Percentages computed from the counts.

**Wire on import:** Google Drive + Google Sheets OAuth2 (no OpenAI). Confirm the source + output folder ids in `Build Config`. Run Manually to test, or leave the daily trigger.
